adr_entry:
No ADR required.

Rationale: US-007 adds dataset-level validation (duplicate detection, cross-reference checking) and sorting on top of the existing row-level parsing in parseCardCsv.ts. This is a contained addition to the data layer — two new pure functions piped into the existing loadCardDeck.ts pipeline. It introduces no new dependencies, no new architectural patterns, and no changes to module boundaries, routing, styling approach, or component structure. The existing ADRs (shell layout, hash router) are unaffected. The plan correctly complements rather than duplicates the row-level validation already present in parseCardCsv.ts.
